heading: Write-Blocking Considerations
body:
Write-blocking behavior has the following considerations:

- Atlas currently blocks writes to the primary node on replica sets
  (non-sharded clusters) on dedicated clusters running MongoDB 8.0+.

- Atlas doesn't block writes on Free clusters and Flex clusters.

- Atlas monitors disk utilization on the primary node only.

- Atlas doesn't monitor disk utilization on secondary, read-only, search,
  or analytics nodes.
